{{Quote|If you ask me, Inaldra is losing control of this station. Every day it seems like we get more and more hurt workers coming in.|Alisia|<ref name="SWG:TPS" />}}
'''Alisia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who worked as a [[Space station/Legends|station]] [[Nurse/Legends|nurse]] in the [[Medical bay/Legends|medical bay]] of [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Alisia and a [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]] named [[2-1b-58|Billingsly]] worked alongside a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Medic/Legends|Medic Master]] named [[Aja Sen]] by helping to treat injured and sick beings aboard the station.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I don't have much time to talk. I have to heal these patients. Too bad there aren't more medics around. If these people had a medic in their group, they might not be here.|Alisia|<ref name="SWG:TPS" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] by the name of Alisia served as a [[Space station/Legends|station]] [[Nurse/Legends|nurse]] in the [[Medical bay/Legends|medical bay]] of [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Tansarii Point Station was a space station built by [[Nova Orion Industries]] by the time following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. Located near [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]], the station was owned and operated by the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]], and was headed by a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] named [[Inaldra/Legends|Inaldra]]. Shortly after [[Station Master]] Inaldra assumed command, the station was riddled with problems. Wild animals ran freely in the station's atrium, dysfunctional [[Droid/Legends|droids]] roamed the droid repair center, and representatives of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and [[Genesis Red (gang)|Genesis Red]] were present on the station. This dire situation resulted in more and more injured workers being sent to the station's sick bay, much to Alisia's chagrin, who remarked that Inaldra was losing control of the station.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

Alisia tended to this influx of patients with the help of a couple of his associates, including a [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]] named [[2-1b-58|Billingsly]], and the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Medic/Legends|Medic Master]] [[Aja Sen]]. Despite this valued assistance, Alisia still lamented the lack of qualified medics. Alisia recognized the dangers that were present on the upper and lower levels of the station, including their infestation by voracious beasts and thugs loyal to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. However, not all of Alisia's patients were injured onboard Tansarii Point Station. At least one patient found their way back from [[Station Gamma]], a nearby research facility similarly plagued with violent thugs and out of control droids.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

==Personality and traits==
[[File:AlisiaGHeal.jpg|200px|thumb|Alisia tending to a patient onboard Tansarii Point Station]]
{{Quote|The upper and lower levels are dangerous on this station. They have become infested with Hutt thugs and voracious beasts.|Alisia|<ref name="SWG:TPS" />}}
Alisia had tan skin and black [[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Alisia was opinionated, and criticized Inaldra for failing to keep the peace aboard Tansarii Point Station. He also bemoaned the lack of qualified medics willing and able to handle the sudden influx of injured station workers. Regardless, Alisia remained committed to the goal of healing his patients.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

==Equipment==
As a station nurse aboard Tansarii Point Station, Alisia wore a white and grey reinforced [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]]. Additional [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] included a pair of grey casual shoes.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Alisia was a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Alisia was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:TPS" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> In the game, Alisia could be found wandering the station's medical bay tending to patients. This character was not involved in any [[W:c:swg:Quest|quest]] but would divulge details about the station to players who conversed with him.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />

Alisia's gender was not explicitly revealed in any kind of dialogue, however using an in-game text command identified Alisia as a male. However, it should be noted that due to game mechanics, all [[W:c:swg:Gran|Gran]] character models in ''Star Wars Galaxies'' were male by default, regardless of the developers' intentions.<ref name="SWG:TPS" />
